heading: Definitions
label: 9561 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title XX of div. P of , , , which is classified generally to this subchapter. CodificationSection was enacted as part of the European Energy Security and Diversification Act of 2019, and also as part of the Further Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2020, and not as part of the Countering Russian Influence in Europe and Eurasia Act of 2017 which comprises this chapter.
amendments: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title XX of div. P of , , , which is classified generally to this subchapter. children.label: E
children.text: commercial support, such as trade missions, reverse trade missions, technical workshops, international buyer programs, and international partner searchers to link suppliers to projects;

children.label: F
children.text: technical assistance and other guidance to improve the local regulatory environment and market frameworks to encourage transparent competition and enhance energy security; and

children.heading: Late-stage project support
children.label: 2 Late-stage project support
children.text: The term “late-stage project support” includes debt financing, insurance, and transaction advisory services.
